name: Fast Royal
short_description: Fast Royal is a battle royale game that distills the adrenaline of traditional titles into their most intense final moments, all set in a fully destructible arena. You drop straight into the action, the storm is already closing in. No time to waste! Gear up and fight to be the last one standing.
detailed_description:
High Intensity Battle Royale Experience

Fast Royal is a battle royale game that distills the adrenaline of traditional titles into their most intense final moments. You drop straight into the action, with the storm already closing in. There's no time to waste! Run, gear up, and fight to be the last one standing.

Fully Destructible Arena

In Fast Royal, everything around you can be destroyed! Walls, cover, and even the ground beneath your feet. There’s nowhere to hide for long. The battlefield is constantly changing, forcing you to stay on the move, adapt, and fight in the open.

Upgrade System – Weapons & Characters

Fast Royal features an advanced upgrade system that allows players to enhance both their weapons and their robotic character during matches. Instead of relying on traditional loot mechanics, players collect "mechanical points" by opening loot crates or defeating enemies. These points can be spent in real-time to improve:

  • Weapons – Increasing damage, fire rate, ammo capacity, and efficiency.

  • Character Stats – Boosting health, shields, speed, agility, energy, and overall performance.

This mechanic adds a RPBA progression (Role Playing Battle Arena) within a battle royale setting, offering deep customization and adaptability mid-game.

Energy Management – The Key to Survival

In Fast Royal, robots run on energy, which is essential for all functions, including movement and combat. Energy must be replenished using batteries, which can be found in loot crates or dropped by defeated enemies.

Energy serves as the core survival resource, meaning that players must:

  • Strategically manage movement and abilities to avoid running out of power.

  • Prioritize collecting batteries while securing kills and loot.

Balance offense and defense to conserve resources.
